info.name: Bifrost — Kubernetes MCP Demo
info.description: Updated for cluster rebuild. Set ADMIN_KEY and RESTRICTED_KEY from Bifrost UI → Keys tab.

item.name: 🔒 Restricted (Read-Only) — 7 tools
item.description: Uses RESTRICTED_KEY. Safe for demos — list and get operations only, no mutations.

exec: let data; try { data=JSON.parse(text); } catch(_){ data=null; }

if(data&&data.items){ rows=data.items.map(p=>{ const s=p.status&&p.status.phase?p.status.phase:'Unknown'; const cs=p.status&&p.status.containerStatuses||[]; const ready=cs.length?cs.filter(c=>c.ready).length+'/'+cs.length:'-'; const restarts=cs.reduce((a,c)=>a+c.restartCount,0); return `${p.metadata.namespace}${p.metadata.name}${s}${ready}${restarts}${p.metadata.creationTimestamp||''}`; }).join(''); }

if(data&&data.items){ rows=data.items.map(p=>{ const s=p.status&&p.status.phase?p.status.phase:'Unknown'; const cs=p.status&&p.status.containerStatuses||[]; const ready=cs.length?cs.filter(c=>c.ready).length+'/'+cs.length:'-'; const restarts=cs.reduce((a,c)=>a+c.restartCount,0); const node=p.spec&&p.spec.nodeName?p.spec.nodeName:'-'; return `${p.metadata.name}${s}${ready}${restarts}${node}${p.metadata.creationTimestamp||''}`; }).join(''); }

if(data&&data.items){ rows=data.items.map(a=>{ const health=a.status&&a.status.health?a.status.health.status:'-'; const sync=a.status&&a.status.sync?a.status.sync.status:'-'; const dest=a.spec&&a.spec.destination?`${a.spec.destination.server||''} / ${a.spec.destination.namespace||''}`:'-'; return `${a.metadata.name}${a.metadata.namespace}${health}${sync}${dest}`; }).join(''); }

if(data&&data.items){ rows=data.items.map(d=>{ const desired=d.spec.replicas||0; const ready=d.status&&d.status.readyReplicas?d.status.readyReplicas:0; const cls=ready===desired?'ok':ready===0?'err':'warn'; const images=d.spec.template.spec.containers.map(c=>c.image).join(', '); return `${d.metadata.name}${d.metadata.namespace}${ready}/${desired}${d.status&&d.status.updatedReplicas||0}${images}${d.metadata.creationTimestamp||''}`; }).join(''); }

item.name: 🔧 Direct Prometheus Queries (No MCP)
item.description: Direct HTTP queries to Prometheus API — bypasses MCP server, always stable

request.description: Get all Bifrost success request metrics (instant query)

exec:
const styles = `body{font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif;background:#0f172a;color:#e2e8f0;padding:16px;margin:0}h2{color:#fb923c;margin:0 0 8px;font-size:14px;text-transform:uppercase}p.sub{color:#475569;font-size:11px;margin:0 0 12px}table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:11px}th{background:#1e293b;color:#94a3b8;text-align:left;padding:8px;font-weight:600;border-bottom:1px solid #334155}td{padding:6px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid #1e293b;font-family:monospace;overflow:hidden}tr:hover td{background:#1e293b55}.val{color:#86efac;font-weight:bold}.lbl{color:#cbd5e1;font-size:10px}`; try{const resp = pm.response.json();const results = resp.data.result || [];let html = `

Bifrost Metrics (Direct)

✓ Prometheus API — ${results.length} series

`;if(results.length){html += '';results.slice(0,25).forEach(r=>{const lbl = Object.entries(r.metric).filter(([k,v])=>k!=='__name__').map(([k,v])=>`${k}=${v}`).join(', ');const val = r.value[1];html += ``;}); html += '
LabelsValue
${lbl}${val}
';}else{html += '

No data

';}pm.visualizer.set(html);}catch(e){pm.visualizer.set(`

Error: ${e.message}

`);}

request.description: Get all Bifrost error request metrics

exec:
const styles = `body{font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif;background:#0f172a;color:#e2e8f0;padding:16px;margin:0}h2{color:#fb923c;margin:0 0 8px;font-size:14px}p.sub{color:#475569;font-size:11px;margin:0 0 12px}table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:11px}th{background:#1e293b;color:#94a3b8;text-align:left;padding:8px;font-weight:600;border-bottom:1px solid #334155}td{padding:6px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid #1e293b;font-family:monospace}tr:hover td{background:#1e293b55}.val{color:#f87171;font-weight:bold}.warn{color:#fbbf24}`; try{const resp = pm.response.json();const results = resp.data.result || [];let html = `

Bifrost Errors

⚠️ Error requests — ${results.length} series

`;if(results.length){html += '';results.slice(0,25).forEach(r=>{const lbl = Object.entries(r.metric).filter(([k,v])=>k!=='__name__').map(([k,v])=>`${k}=${v}`).join(', ');const val = r.value[1];html += ``;}); html += '
LabelsErrors
${lbl}${val}
';}else{html += '

✓ No errors detected

';}pm.visualizer.set(html);}catch(e){pm.visualizer.set(`

Error: ${e.message}

`);}

request.description: Success request rate per provider over 5 minutes

exec:
const styles = `body{font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif;background:#0f172a;color:#e2e8f0;padding:16px;margin:0}h2{color:#10b981;margin:0 0 8px;font-size:14px}p.sub{color:#475569;font-size:11px;margin:0 0 12px}table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:11px}th{background:#1e293b;color:#94a3b8;text-align:left;padding:8px;font-weight:600;border-bottom:1px solid #334155}td{padding:6px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid #1e293b;font-family:monospace}tr:hover td{background:#1e293b55}.provider{color:#cbd5e1}.rate{color:#10b981;font-weight:bold}`; try{const resp = pm.response.json();const results = resp.data.result || [];let html = `

Success Rate by Provider

📈 5m average rate

`;if(results.length){html += '';results.forEach(r=>{const prov = r.metric.provider || 'unknown';const rate = (parseFloat(r.value[1]) || 0).toFixed(2);html += ``;}); html += '
ProviderRate (req/s)
${prov}${rate}
';}else{html += '

No data

';}pm.visualizer.set(html);}catch(e){pm.visualizer.set(`

Error: ${e.message}

`);}

request.description: Output token generation rate by model

exec:
const styles = `body{font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif;background:#0f172a;color:#e2e8f0;padding:16px;margin:0}h2{color:#06b6d4;margin:0 0 8px;font-size:14px}p.sub{color:#475569;font-size:11px;margin:0 0 12px}table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:11px}th{background:#1e293b;color:#94a3b8;text-align:left;padding:8px;font-weight:600;border-bottom:1px solid #334155}td{padding:6px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid #1e293b;font-family:monospace}tr:hover td{background:#1e293b55}.model{color:#cbd5e1}.throughput{color:#06b6d4;font-weight:bold}`; try{const resp = pm.response.json();const results = resp.data.result || [];let html = `

Token Throughput

💬 Output tokens/sec by model

`;if(results.length){html += '';results.forEach(r=>{const model = r.metric.model || 'unknown';const rate = (parseFloat(r.value[1]) || 0).toFixed(1);html += ``;}); html += '
ModelTokens/sec
${model}${rate}
';}else{html += '

No data

';}pm.visualizer.set(html);}catch(e){pm.visualizer.set(`

Error: ${e.message}

`);}

request.description: Time series query for the last hour. Set start_time and end_time in pre-request script or use Unix timestamps.

exec: const now = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);const oneHourAgo = now - 3600;pm.environment.set('end_time', now.toString());pm.environment.set('start_time', oneHourAgo.toString());

const styles = `body{font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif;background:#0f172a;color:#e2e8f0;padding:16px;margin:0}h2{color:#8b5cf6;margin:0 0 8px;font-size:14px}p.sub{color:#475569;font-size:11px;margin:0 0 12px}table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:10px}th{background:#1e293b;color:#94a3b8;text-align:left;padding:6px;font-weight:600;border-bottom:1px solid #334155}td{padding:4px 6px;border-bottom:1px solid #1e293b;font-family:monospace}tr:hover td{background:#1e293b55}.ts{color:#cbd5e1}.val{color:#8b5cf6;font-weight:bold}`; try{const resp = pm.response.json();const results = resp.data.result || [];let html = `

Bifrost Requests Timeline

📊 1-hour range query — ${results.length} series

`;if(results.length){html += '';results.slice(0,10).forEach(r=>{const labels = Object.entries(r.metric).filter(([k,v])=>k!=='__name__').map(([k,v])=>`${k}=${v}`).join(', ');const pts = r.values ? r.values.length : 0;html += ``;}); html += '
SeriesPoints
${labels || 'all'}${pts}

Showing 10 of ${results.length} series

';}else{html += '

No data in range

';}pm.visualizer.set(html);}catch(e){pm.visualizer.set(`

Error: ${e.message}

`);}

item.name: 🚫 Restricted — Access Denied Examples
item.description: These requests intentionally use the RESTRICTED_KEY to call admin-only tools. Expected to fail — demonstrates permission enforcement.

exec: const msg = body.error ? body.error.message : (body.result && body.result.content ? body.result.content[0].text : JSON.stringify(body));

pm.visualizer.set(`
🚫

Access Denied — As Expected

The restricted key cannot call pods_delete

${rows}
`);
const msg = body.error ? body.error.message : (body.result && body.result.content ? body.result.content[0].text : JSON.stringify(body));

pm.visualizer.set(`
🚫

Access Denied — As Expected

The restricted key cannot call resources_scale

${rows}
`);
const msg = body.error ? body.error.message : (body.result && body.result.content ? body.result.content[0].text : JSON.stringify(body));

pm.visualizer.set(`
🚫

Access Denied — As Expected

The restricted key cannot call pods_exec

${rows}
`);

item.name: 🔑 Admin (Full Access) — All tools

item.name: 🔥 Prometheus — Metrics & Queries
item.description: Uses ADMIN_KEY. 28 tools via prometheus-mcp (supergateway SSE bridge) at prometheus-mcp.monitoring.svc.cluster.local:8080.

exec:
pm.visualizer.set(`

Prometheus Health

🔥 Prometheus

${ok?'✅ Healthy':'❌ Unhealthy'}

${text}
`);

rows=alerts.map(a=>{ const sev=(a.labels&&a.labels.severity)||'info'; const name=(a.labels&&a.labels.alertname)||''; const ns=(a.labels&&a.labels.namespace)||''; return `${name}${ns}${sev}${a.state||''}${a.activeAt?new Date(a.activeAt).toLocaleString():''}`; }).join('');
else{ rows=`✓ No active alerts`; }

if(groups.length){ groups.forEach(g=>{ (g.rules||[]).forEach(r=>{ const type=r.type||'alerting'; const state=r.state||'inactive'; rows+=`${g.name||''}${r.name||''}${type==='recording'?'recording':state}${r.query||r.expr||''}`; }); }); }
// Parse the outer JSON wrapper if present
let rows=''; let total=0; let upCount=0;

rows=results.map(r=>{ const val=r.value&&r.value[1]; const up=val==='1'; if(up)upCount++; const m=r.metric||{}; const job=m.job||''; const inst=m.instance||''; const labels=Object.entries(m).filter(([k])=>k!=='__name__'&&k!=='job'&&k!=='instance').map(([k,v])=>`${k}=${v}`).join(' '); return `${up?'●':'●'}${job}${inst}${labels}`; }).join('');
// Extract job= and instance= from label string

const summary=`
${upCount}
UP
${total-upCount}
DOWN
${total}
TOTAL
`;

item.name: Instant query — CPU usage by pod

exec: rows=sorted.map(r=>{ const v=parseFloat(r.value[1]); const m=r.metric||{}; return `${m.namespace||''}${m.pod||m.instance||''}${(v*100).toFixed(3)}%`; }).join('');

pm.visualizer.set(`

CPU Usage by Pod

🔥 Prometheus

sum(rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{container!=''}[5m])) by (namespace, pod)
${rows}
NamespacePodCPU %
`);

item.name: Instant query — Memory usage by pod

exec: const fmt=b=>{ b=parseFloat(b); if(b>1073741824)return (b/1073741824).toFixed(2)+'GB'; if(b>1048576)return (b/1048576).toFixed(1)+'MB'; if(b>1024)return (b/1024).toFixed(0)+'KB'; return b+'B'; };

pm.visualizer.set(`

Memory Usage by Pod

🔥 Prometheus

sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{container!=''}) by (namespace, pod)
${rows}
NamespacePodMemory
`);

item.name: Range query — CPU rate last hour

exec: // Range query returns different text format
// Text format for range queries: parse series blocks

items=seriesBlocks.map(block=>{ const lines=block.trim().split('\n'); const labels={}; const nameMatch=lines[0]&&lines[0].match(/^([^{\s]+)/); if(nameMatch) labels['__name__']=nameMatch[1]; const labelStr=lines[0]&&lines[0].match(/\{([^}]*)\}/); if(labelStr){ labelStr[1].split(', ').forEach(p=>{ const [k,...v]=p.split('='); if(k) labels[k.trim()]=v.join('=').replace(/^\\?"?|\\?"?$/g,''); }); } const values=lines.slice(1).map(l=>{ const m=l.match(/=> ([\d.e+\-]+) @/); return m?[null,m[1]]:null; }).filter(Boolean); return {metric:labels, values}; });

rows=items.map(r=>{ const latest=r.values&&r.values[r.values.length-1]; const v=latest?parseFloat(latest[1]):0; const pts=r.values?r.values.length:0; const m=r.metric||{}; return `${m.namespace||''}${m.pod||m.instance||''}${(v*100).toFixed(4)}%${pts} pts`; }).join('');

pm.visualizer.set(`

CPU Rate — Last Hour

🔥 Prometheus range query

sum(rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{container!=''}[5m])) by (namespace, pod)
${rows}
NamespacePodLatest CPU %Data Points
`);

Object.entries(data).forEach(([section,val])=>{ html+=`

${section}

`; if(Array.isArray(val)){ html+=`${val.map(e=>``).join('')}
NameValue
${e.name||e.labelName||''}${e.value||e.seriesCount||''}
`; } else if(typeof val==='object'&&val){ html+=`${Object.entries(val).map(([k,v])=>``).join('')}
${k}${v}
`; } else{ html+=`

${val}

`; } });

pm.visualizer.set(`

Label Names (${labels.length})

🔥 Prometheus

${rows}
Label
`);

item.name: 🔮 Bifrost — Gateway Metrics
item.description: Bifrost-specific metrics scraped from /metrics by Prometheus. Shows requests, tokens, latency and error rates per provider/model/key.
